case_title: LEGAL PROCESSING BUREAU vs. DAVIS, ROBERTO et al

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGAL PROCESSING BUREAU AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, ROBERTO DOES 1-20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-17-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-18-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-29-1996

ORDER FOR DISMISSING SANCTIONS AND APPLICATION

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-29-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-29-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-20-1996 CONTINUED FROM JUL-29-1996 TO AUG-28-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: DANA, FLAUM SUBSTITUTED FOR KOLODZIEJ, DANIEL J AS ATTORNEY FOR LEGAL PROCESSING BUREAU

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-27-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUN-27-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUL-29-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
